case_title: MARKET UNOCAL, INC. VS LEUNG, KWANG TIM

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LEUNG, KWANG TIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $239.00 FILED BY MARKET UNOCAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, KWANG TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERT MAIL TO ZIPPING DVONG C/O MARKET UNOCAL INC. RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKET UNOCAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, KWANG TIM $109.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $129.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23381, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKET UNOCAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, KWANG TIM $79.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $99.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23381 ON 10-6-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
